panel.loginSub: Log in with your whitelisted RP Name to access the phone system.
panel.dashTitle: Welcome to the DLRP Phone System
panel.dashDesc: Dream Legacy RolePlay (DLRP) is an immersive roleplay community built on experience and storytelling. This phone system gives you access to a fully-featured in-game smartphone with apps, contacts, banking, and more.
panel.fMessagesDesc: Text any contact in your phonebook
panel.fJobsDesc: Apply for jobs and manage your career
panel.fDreamgramDesc: Social media with posts and DMs
panel.fEmergencyDesc: Quick access to police and EMS
panel.step1: 1. Choose a phone model from the
panel.step2: 2. Log in with your whitelisted RP Name and password.
panel.step3: 3. Explore the DreamOS interface with all its apps and features.
panel.step4: 4. Manage your profile, bank account, and settings from the panel.
panel.pendingDesc: Your whitelist application hasn't been approved yet. You'll get a DM on Discord once it's reviewed.
panel.deniedDesc: Your whitelist application wasn't approved. Reach out on Discord if you have questions.
panel.notInGuildDesc: You need to be a member of the Dream Legacy RP Discord server to use the Panel. Rejoin and your access will be reviewed again.
panel.bannedDesc: Your access has been revoked. Contact staff on Discord if you believe this is a mistake.

shop.title: DLRP | Phone Shop
shop.heading: 📱 Phone Shop
shop.sub: Choose your device. Each model has its own look, wallpaper, and startup animation.
shop.buyingAs: Buying as your logged-in Discord account.
shop.loginFirst: Log in from the Panel first.
shop.alreadyOwn: You already own a phone. Sell it (Settings app in DreamOS) before buying another.
shop.alreadyOwnBanner: You already own a phone. Buying another one isn't available yet.

dreamos.loginMsg: Log in from the Panel to access your phone.
dreamos.noPhoneMsg: You don't own a phone yet. Buy one from the Phone Shop to access DreamOS.
dreamos.notInGuild: You're no longer a member of the Discord server. Rejoin to regain access.
dreamos.notApproved: Your whitelist application hasn't been approved yet.
dreamos.banned: You've been banned. Contact staff on Discord if you believe this is a mistake.
